name: IRC_CAMP_ASSET_URLS_VL
query: SELECT B.ASSET_URL_ID, B.DEEP_LINK_ID, B.ASSET_ID, TL.URL, B.GOAL_ID, B.GOAL_RESPONSE_ID, B.REQUISITION_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_CAMP_ASSET_URLS_B B, IRC_CAMP_ASSET_URLS_TL TL WHERE B.ASSET_URL_ID = TL.ASSET_URL_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
